The following events took place in '''25,100 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]]''':

==Events==
*[[Xim/Legends|Xim the Despot]] orders a secret vault built on the Swampland estate of his [[Desevro/Legends|Desevrar]] chamberlain.
*The [[Treaty of Vontor]] is signed, putting the [[Klatooinian/Legends|Klatooinians]], the [[Nikto/Legends|Nikto]], and the [[Vodran (species)/Legends|Vodrans]] in a state of permanent servitude towards the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutts]].<ref name="Fate of the Jedi: Allies">''[[Fate of the Jedi: Allies]]''</ref>
*[[Hutt/Legends|Hutts]] gain control of the [[Si'Klaata Cluster/Legends|Si'Klaata Cluster]].
*The [[Arbran (species)|Arbran]] civilization flourishes on [[Arbra/Legends|Arbra]] around this time, creating the entity known as "The [[Darker]]."
*[[Herglic/Legends|Herglic]] perfect their version of the [[Rakata/Legends|Rakatan]] [[Force-drive|Force-powered hyperdrive]]. {{Circa}}
*[[Borte Belgoth]] commissions the creation of [[Belgoth's Beacon]], a [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] beacon on the [[Perlemian Trade Route/Legends|Perlemian Trade Route]]. {{Circa}}<ref name="EA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref>
